nasb.text: But Nabal answered David’s servants and said, “Who is David? And who is the son of Jesse? There are many servants today who are each breaking away from his master.

esv.text: And Nabal answered David’s servants, “Who is David? Who is the son of Jesse? There are many servants these days who are breaking away from their masters.

cnv.text: 拿八回答大衛的僕人說：“大衛是誰？耶西的兒子是誰？現在離開主人逃走的僕人太多了。

ccb.text: 拿八说：“大卫是谁？耶西的儿子是谁？这些日子有很多仆人逃离主人，
